See BEA recommandations

Glossary

We found 6559 notified events

Need help about the search engine ?

1. Standard search engine

You can use the search engine  by entering for example the registration of the aircraft or a keyword (name of the manufacturer, the place of the event etc ...)

2. Advanced search filters

For a more precise search, you can use the search filters

- you can activate several filters at the same time (click on the + of each category, then tick the chosen filter)
- each activated filter is displayed at the top of the list

3. Investigations carried out by the BEA

The results include by default all events which have been notified to the BEA and which are carried out by the BEA or a foreign counterpart.

- to access the investigations carried out by the BEA, you must activate the "France" filter in "Investigation authority in charge".
- to differentiate the BEA investigations closed or in progress, you must then activate the corresponding filter in "status"

Accident to the Cessna 208 registered F-HFDZ on 24/05/2026 at Frétoy-le-Château AD

Collision of a skydiver with the aircraft’s horizontal tail during the drop

Aircraft category Aeroplane - Small aeroplane
Operation Type Specialised Operations (Aerial Work) - Parachute drop
Responsable entity France - BEA
Operator France - Other (Skydive Frêtoy)

Accident to the glider Glaser Dirks DG500 registered F-CHJE and to the plane Morane Saulnier MS893 registered F-BPMN on 23/05/2026 at Bailleau - Armenonville AD

Long take-off roll, glider pilot releasing tow rope at end of runway, collision with ground

Aircraft category Sailplane (Glider) - Non-powered sailplane (Glider)
Operation Type Non-Commercial Operations - Pleasure - Local
Responsable entity France - BEA
Operator France - Other (Groupe l'Air)

Serious incident to the Airbus A320 registered CS-TNX operated by TAP on 19/05/2026 at Roma (Italy)

Tail strike during take-off

Aircraft category Aeroplane - Large aeroplane
Operation Type Commercial Air Transport - Passenger - Airline
Responsable entity Italy - ANSV
Operator Portugal - Transportes Aereos Portugueses, SA

Accident to the Fouga Magister CM-170 registered F-AZQC on 11/05/2026 at Chailly-en-Bière

Collision with ground

Aircraft category Aeroplane - Fast jet/ combat aeroplane
Operation Type Non-Commercial Operations - Unknown
Responsable entity France - BEA
Operator France - Private Operator

Serious incident to the Airbus A320 registered ZS-SZE operated by SAA on 11/05/2026 near Cape Town (South Africa)

Severe turbulence and windshear during the approach

Aircraft category Aeroplane - Large aeroplane
Operation Type Commercial Air Transport - Passenger - Airline
Responsable entity South Africa - AIID
Operator South Africa - South African Airways (Saa)

Accident to the Tech'aero TR200 registered F-PITR on 09/05/2026 at Clermont-Ferrand - Auvergne AD

Windscreen breakage, collision with ground during an aerobatic flight

Aircraft category Aeroplane - Small aeroplane
Operation Type Non-Commercial Operations - Flight Training/Instructional - Aerobatics
Responsable entity France - BEA
Operator France - Private Operator

Serious incident to the flex-wing microlight Air Création NUVIX 15 identified 86TG and the plane Pilatus PC21 registered F-RBFJ on 07/05/2026 at Usseau

Loss of separation between a microlight in its initial climb and a military aircraft conducting low-altitude training

Aircraft category Microlight - Microlight-Class 2-Flex wing
Operation Type Non-Commercial Operations - Pleasure - Cross Country
Responsable entity France - BEA
Operator France - Private Operator

Accident to the Airbus AS350 registered HB-ZEJ operated by Tarmac Aviation on 04/05/2026 at Mezzovico-Vira (Switzerland)

Reduction in engine power during landing, collision with ground

Aircraft category Helicopter - Small helicopter
Operation Type Commercial Air Transport - Passenger - Air Taxi
Responsable entity Switzerland - STSB
Operator Switzerland - Tarmac Aviation Sa

Incident to the ATR 72 registered EC-JXF operated by Swiftair on 04/05/2026 near Marseille-Provence AD

Failure of the aircraft performance monitoring system, disengagement of the autopilot, stiffening of the flight controls, U-turn, in stormy conditions at night

Aircraft category Aeroplane - Large aeroplane
Operation Type Commercial Air Transport - Cargo - Airline
Responsable entity France - BEA
Operator Spain - Swiftair, S.A.

Accident to the Guimbal Cabri G2 registered HS-SSG on 03/05/2026 at Bang Mek Khao (Thailand)

Loss of engine power during take-off, emergency landing, blades striking tall grass, fire

Aircraft category Helicopter - Small helicopter
Operation Type Non-Commercial Operations
Responsable entity Thailand - AIB
Operator Thailand - Other (P.S.C. Starch Products Public Company Limited)
